reviews.review_msg: She's a nice person but I didn't find this class helpful at all. Lectures frequently ran off topic and the reading list seemed totally supplementary. I didn't even bother to read the last 3. Her marking scheme is useless as well. She offers only grammatical corrections and no real feedback to help you with on your paper. I'll be avoiding her.

Karyn is a spectacular professor! She runs an interesting class with ample time for discussion. Yes, she gives writing assessments and flexible due dates. Firstly, its 3rd year, you should be able to do them no sweat. Secondly, she assigns them to HELP you do better on your Term paper. She gives ample opportunity to get top marks. Excellent prof!
